chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln No.157 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority case 1. For hearing of case 2. For hearing of MA No.2397/2025 08.09.2025 None present for the applicant. Mr. M. Ameer Advocate a/w respondent No.2. Mr. Mohsin Mangi, APG Sindh. ------------------------------- None is present on behalf of the applicant. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. Today is the third time when nobody is present for the applicant. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Asif
